text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm not good enough... I can't win as I am right now...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I want to win the Kikuka Sho, I have to grow
strong enough to remain unaffected by whatever
troubles come my way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond trains daily in preparation for
the Kikuka Sho. Day by day, I can tell her
performance is becoming sharper and more
polished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although there are no problems with her
progress, Satono Diamond seems to be pushing
herself extremely hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In particular, I keep hearing her repeating the
phrase "I need the strength to overcome the jinx!"

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm able to handle incline dashes pretty
easily now.
choice_data_list: Think you can manage two more rounds?
Think you can manage two more rounds?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll try running one more for now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if her near obsession with the jinx is due
to the weight of the Satono family's expectations
on her shoulders. If so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think I would benefit from asking for help from a
very particular someone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best today, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: M-M-McQueen?! You're training with me today?!
choice_data_list: I'm sure it'll be very educational!
I'm sure it'll be very educational!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I think so too! Thank you so much for this
precious opportunity, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. No need to thank me. This will be a good
experience for me too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Since we don't have a lot of time, let's warm up
with a light run, then do some partner running.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sounds good!

text_block_list.name: Dia & McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaaah!
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I was so close to catching you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You fell too far behind in the first half. You
should focus on reworking your strategy to keep
up with the leading runner's pace.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense... Thank you! This has really
helped me identify my shortcomings!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm glad to hear that. Now then, how about
we cool down with a jog?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond wears a bright, cheerful
expression on her face, and the desperation that
previously plagued her is nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I was right in choosing to talk with Mejiro
McQueen. I figured she'd understand Satono
Diamond's situation, being in a similar one
herself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Oh! Um, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I just saw a food truck that's selling honeyade!
Would it be all right if I go buy one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, you're right. Why don't we go ahead and
take a refreshment break?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's quite a large beverage you've ordered
there...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This food truck actually has a famous jinx
associated with it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Supposedly, if you drink an XL lemon honeyade
with extra whipped, thick honey, you'll lose your
next race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd drink one before the Kikuka Sho in
order to break the jinx!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Break the... jinx?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, the reason why I ran in the
Satsuki Sho and Japanese Derby is because of a
jinx...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. So that's why you're more determined than
ever to overcome the jinx in the Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I refuse to lose to it! The Kikuka Sho will
serve as my proof that I can beat it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your resolve to grow stronger and overcome your
jinx is truly admirable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is it possible that your perceiving bad luck as a
jinx is the very reason you lost your composure?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to racing, especially in the longer
races, maintaining one's calm is paramount for
victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Discomposure leads to inattentiveness, and the
mental strain can drain your stamina. As a result,
you become unable to run in the manner you
want.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I had a similar experience. I was struck by some
bad luck during a crucial race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You've gone through the same thing too? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Was that during the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was a critical race for me, as I was aiming
for consecutive victories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But just before I entered the starting gate, I felt
my right foot snag on something, and discovered
one of my cleats had come clear off.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I remember. It was bent in half, so you repaired it
right then and there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right. At the time, I didn't think of the
damaged cleat as being bad luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I just calmly focused on fixing it. And so, when
the race began...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The thing I thought about and paid attention to
wasn't my right cleat or even Teio, whom people
regarded as my rival then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I only gave mind to running well and winning the
race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I focused on my own running for the whole 3,200
meters. That's the reason I managed to win.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Focus only on your own running...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
During the Japanese Derby, my cleat got
damaged and I had to wear my spare shoes. They
were all I could think about for the entire race...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't concentrate on the race at all. It was
frustrating not being able to run the way I
wanted...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It seems you've finally realized it for
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You mean my preoccupation with the jinx is
what's keeping me prisoner to it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I stop thinking about it, then it won't affect
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That is what I think, at least.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've never considered that before. But that does
make sense...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I think I understand why you're able to carry
yourself with such unfaltering strength.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're able to conduct yourself with grace and
dignity because you're always focusing solely on
your own running and goals.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you're very grounded. Hehe! You
really are incredible, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I am humbled by your praise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You know, jinxes are generally created after
something bad has happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I had lost that race, people might have said it
was because of a jinx. But when I won, there was
no mention of any such thing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's true, now that you mention it! Then the jinx
that says you'll lose your next race if you drink a
lemon honeyade might be the same...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it arose from its tendency to offset
people's weights. It's quite calorically dense, and
the lemon flavor masks its sugar content.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... I already finished mine...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! I need to do some extra training to
work off the honeyade!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Last night, I wrote down the challenges I need to
overcome before the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to work on my pacing for the
3,000-meter race, research race positioning,
simulate race scenarios... and I have to build more
endurance.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There are so many things I need to address! I
don't have any time to worry about jinxes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to perfect my running and seize certain
victory in the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond makes a powerful declaration
for victory with a bright expression on her face!
